tools.Name: OpenViking
tools.Description: An open-source context database for AI Agents that manages memory, resources, and skills using a file system paradigm.
tools.Use_Case: Unified context management for complex AI agents to reduce token usage and improve retrieval.

tools.Name: DimOS
tools.Description: An agent-native operating system for physical robotics (humanoids, quadrupeds, drones) that allows building multi-agent systems via natural language.
tools.Use_Case: Developing agentic control for physical hardware without traditional complex robotics middleware.

tools.Name: Heretic
tools.Description: A fully automatic tool for removing safety alignment/censorship from transformer-based language models using parameter-optimized directional ablation.
tools.Use_Case: Removing censorship from LLMs while preserving model intelligence and capabilities.
